results.label: continuous_add
results.theorem: Continuous (fun x => f x + g x)

tactics_tried.tactic: by_cases h : Continuous fun x => f x + g x
have : Continuous fun x => -g x := hf.add hg
change Continuous fun x => f x + g x
change Continuous fun x => x + g x
by_cases h : Continuous fun x ↦ f x + g x
change Continuous fun x => g x + g x
by_cases h : Continuous fun x => g x + g x

elaboration_results.tactic: by_cases h : Continuous fun x => f x + g x
have : Continuous fun x => -g x := hf.add hg
change Continuous fun x => f x + g x
change Continuous fun x => x + g x
by_cases h : Continuous fun x ↦ f x + g x
change Continuous fun x => g x + g x
by_cases h : Continuous fun x => g x + g x

results.label: continuous_mul
results.theorem: Continuous (fun x => f x * g x)

tactics_tried.tactic: change Continuous fun x => g x * g x
change Continuous fun x => f x * g x
change Continuous fun x => (f x, g x)

elaboration_results.tactic: change Continuous fun x => g x * g x
change Continuous fun x => f x * g x
change Continuous fun x => (f x, g x)

results.label: differentiable_add
results.theorem: Differentiable ℝ (fun x => f x + g x)

results.label: differentiable_mul
results.theorem: Differentiable ℝ (fun x => f x * g x)

results.label: hasDerivAt_add
results.theorem: HasDerivAt (fun x => f x + g x) (f' + g') x

results.label: hasDerivAt_const_mul
results.theorem: HasDerivAt (fun x => c * f x) (c * f') x

tactics_tried.tactic: simpa using (hasDerivAt_const x c).HasDerivAt.mul hf c

elaboration_results.tactic: simpa using (hasDerivAt_const x c).HasDerivAt.mul hf c

tactics_tried.tactic: rcases hf with ⟨u, hu, p, Hp⟩
rcases hf with ⟨u, H, p, Hp⟩

elaboration_results.tactic: rcases hf with ⟨u, hu, p, Hp⟩
rcases hf with ⟨u, H, p, Hp⟩

results.label: tendsto_add
results.theorem: Filter.Tendsto (fun x => f x + g x) l (nhds (a + b))
